headline: Visual Lease Named 2026 GlobeSt. Influencer in CRE Technology
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., March 23, 2026--Visual Lease ("VL"), a CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP) brand and platform for integrated lease management, accounting, reporting and analytics, today announced it has been honored as a 2026 Influencer in CRE Technology by GlobeSt.
